settlements.name: Disney YouTube TV / DirecTV Stream Settlement
settlements.category: Antitrust — alleged inflated live TV streaming prices
settlements.payoutTerms: pro rata by subscription length; final amount TBD after claims
eligibility: I purchased a YouTube TV and/or DirecTV Stream (including DirecTV Now / AT&T TV Now) subscription between April 1, 2019 and March 31, 2026
I understand payments are pro rata from the net settlement fund and not a fixed dollar amount

settlements.name: Google Assistant Privacy Settlement
settlements.payoutTerms: point-based from $68M fund; ~$2–$56/device (up to 3) or ~$2–$10 privacy class (counsel estimates)
eligibility: Between May 18, 2016 and March 19, 2026 I purchased a Google-made device (e.g. Pixel, Nest/Home) and/or my communications were recorded by Google Assistant via a False Accept or disclosed to a review vendor
I will submit a claim on the official A.B. Data settlement site and provide purchase proof if claiming as a Purchaser Class member

settlements.name: Circle K / Gas Express Data Incident Settlement
settlements.category: Data breach — May 2024 cyberattack (names / SSNs allegedly accessed)
settlements.payoutTerms: $50 alternate cash (capped) or up to $2,000 documented losses; plus credit monitoring
eligibility: I am a U.S. resident who was sent notice that my Private Information was impacted in the May 2024 Gas Express, LLC d/b/a Circle K data incident
I understand the $50 alternate-cash option is capped (first 700 valid claims) and documented-loss claims require receipts

settlements.name: Fastwyre / SP Data Digital TCPA Settlement
settlements.category: TCPA — calls to numbers on the National Do Not Call Registry
settlements.payoutTerms: up to $181.57 per valid claim (per settlement site)
eligibility: I received calls from SP Data Digital, LLC and/or American Broadband Holding Company d/b/a Fastwyre Broadband while my number was on the National Do Not Call Registry for more than 30 days
I can complete a Claim Form using the Claim ID and PIN from the official postcard notice (or as instructed on the settlement site)

settlements.name: Fanatics Handling Fee Settlement
settlements.category: False advertising — handling fees with free/low-rate shipping claims
settlements.payoutTerms: two $5 Fanatics.com vouchers ($10 total); not cash
eligibility: I purchased merchandise through Fanatics websites between May 6, 2018 and March 30, 2026 and was assessed and paid a handling fee
I understand benefits are Fanatics vouchers (not cash) and the Claim Form may require the Claim ID and PIN from the email notice
